overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous drive through a futuristic metropolis. The journey begins on an elevated highway adjacent to towering skyscrapers with holographic murals, then transitions to ground-level highways passing under elevated transit lines, with the destination approaching the Little China district.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway walkway adjacent to mega-skyscraper

events.description: camera pans left to face the holographic building mural while continuing forward
descends from elevated skyway to ground-level highway intersection

agents.ego_description: navigating an elevated highway while observing the detailed architecture of a nearby skyscraper with large-scale holographic advertisements

entered.detail: tall building featuring a large cyan-colored holographic face advertisement
metal safety barrier along the edge of the elevated roadway
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings in the distance
array of communication dishes attached to building exterior
exposed ventilation and air conditioning equipment on building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway walkway with a panoramic view of the cyberpunk city skyline. The camera moves slowly past a massive skyscraper adorned with a distinctive holographic mural, while satellite dishes and industrial equipment line the right side of the path. The lighting is bright midday sun with clear visibility.

scene_state.functional_zone: open highway intersection with distant skyscrapers

events.description: passing through steam vents emitting from street level
accelerating along the highway while approaching the elevated transit bridge

agents.ego_description: driving at moderate speed along the multi-lane highway, approaching an intersection with an elevated transit line overhead

notable_agents.action: black sedan maintaining speed in the left lane

entered.detail: wide asphalt road with multiple lanes and lane markings
modern building with distinctive sloped roof and glass facade
elevated train track with green-tinted glass sides spanning the highway
large electronic advertisement screen displaying colorful graphics
white steam vents rising from ground level infrastructure

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a wide-open highway intersection bathed in bright sunlight. The camera drives past steam vents and approaches a distinctive green elevated transit bridge. A modern glass office tower stands on the left with a large digital billboard, while sparse traffic moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass beneath elevated transit line

events.description: entering the shadow cast by the elevated transit structure
passing multiple vehicles while driving under the overpass

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway underneath the elevated transit structure, navigating through moderate traffic while approaching the Little China district

notable_agents.action: red sports car overtaking in the right lane
dark truck traveling ahead in the left lane

entered.detail: covered section of highway beneath the elevated transit structure
district identification sign indicating entrance to Little China neighborhood
concrete and metal barriers separating highway lanes

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves into the shadow of the elevated transit overpass, creating a mixed lighting environment of bright sunlight and cool shadows. The highway continues beneath the concrete structure as the camera passes moderate traffic. The Little China district sign becomes visible in the distance on the left, indicating the destination neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-altitude panoramic vista of a futuristic skyline down into the shadowed corridors of a dense urban district. It begins on an elevated highway walkway, gliding past a massive skyscraper adorned with a holographic mural and industrial satellite equipment under the bright midday sun. As the camera descends, the scene opens into a wide-open highway intersection where the sunlight intensifies, passing steam vents and a modern glass office tower with a large digital billboard. The perspective then shifts beneath a green elevated transit bridge, moving from the open glare into a mixed environment of cool shadows and bright light. Finally, the camera continues under the concrete overpass through moderate traffic as a sign for the Little China district emerges in the distance.
